title: DecisionBrief
description: Phase 0 output: the framed decision and the panel convened to decide it.

question.description: The crisp decision to be made.

options.description: Concrete candidate options. Do not invent — derive from the question and context.

summary.description: One line on what choosing this means.

constraints.description: Hard constraints the decision must satisfy.

successCriteria.description: What a good outcome looks like.

contextPack.description: Condensed, citable shared context (repo facts, prior ADRs, MCP findings) given to every member.

panel.description: Roster sized to the decision: core members plus the specialists this question needs.

charter.description: What this member optimizes for and the deliberate bias they bring.

model.description: Soft guidance: diversify across the panel; heavier reasoning for pivotal roles.

chairModel.description: Model for the chair's compile/convergence/synthesis calls. Usually the strongest available.
